creator: steffen@fritz.wtf
text:
(In reply to Franco Fichtner from comment #14)
I don't see how I am wrong, sorry. NBS writes in the issue you have linked that 1) they will not work anymore on the project and 2) that Wargio can fork it and that they will link his project in their README. 

As far as I can see Wargio has no connection to NBS besides a Github fork.

And I don't doubt that it could/should/can work.

I don't want to imply anything, but this is how IT nightmares start.
